prestazioni: KL-ZE (2.5L V6 24V) engine swap with forged internals: Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings, paired with a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft kit for high-RPM power delivery (8,500 RPM redline).

Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (fabricated by HKS), mated to a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with a Burns Stainless muffler.

Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom flex-fuel map (E85 compatible), paired with ID1000x injectors, a Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump, and a custom 3-core GReddy intercooler with a 2.5-inch charge pipe setup for optimized airflow.
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit (Xedos 6-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front and 18x10.5 +45 rear wheels (staggered setup).

Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter (fabricated by AutoTechnique) and a custom carbon fiber duckbill spoiler (designed by Seibon) for aggressive aero balance.

Full custom interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter), and a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with custom carbon fiber gauge pods (housing Defi Advance BF gauges).
